name: sensorInsertInteger
title: sensorInsertInteger
syntax: SensorErrorCode sensorInsertInteger(byte targetBuffer[], dword bufferByteCount, dword signalValue, dword bitOffset, dword bitCount, dword msbFirst);
description: Inserts the given integer value into the given byte array.

parameters.name: targetBuffer
parameters.description: The array in which the given value shall be inserted.

parameters.name: bufferByteCount
parameters.description: The length of the target array in bytes.

parameters.name: signalValue
parameters.description: The value that shall be inserted into the array.

parameters.name: bitOffset
parameters.description: The offset in bits at which the integer value shall be inserted into the byte array.

parameters.name: bitCount
parameters.description: The length of the value in bits (max. 32 is allowed).

parameters.name: msbFirst
parameters.description: This parameter controls in which order the bits of the value are inserted into the array. 1: the bits will be inserted from MSB to LSB. 0: the bits will be inserted from LSB to MSB.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
